overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character moving through a futuristic industrial district. The journey begins on a sidewalk beside an elevated highway, passes through a covered underpass, and continues along an open industrial boulevard lined with palm trees, overhead pipelines, and storage tanks with the city skyline visible in the distance.

agents.ego_description: moving steadily along the concrete sidewalk toward an industrial intersection

entered.detail: tall concrete wall running along the right side of the sidewalk
large elevated highway structure with red and white markings running parallel on the left
modern street lamp post with orange light fixture
tall industrial chimney emitting smoke visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view moving along a narrow concrete sidewalk bordered by a tall retaining wall on the right and an elevated highway structure on the left. The environment is industrial with distant smoke stacks visible, and the ground is littered with debris and cardboard. The camera approaches an intersection with traffic lights ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered roadway under elevated industrial highway

events.description: entering the shadow of the covered underpass, lighting becomes significantly darker
exiting the underpass back into bright direct sunlight

agents.ego_description: passing through the covered intersection beneath the elevated highway structure

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel overpass creating a covered tunnel effect
horizontal traffic light structure spanning the road

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a covered underpass beneath the elevated highway, transitioning from bright sunlight into shadow and back to light. The space is enclosed by overhead concrete structures with traffic lights visible at the far end. The ground transitions from sidewalk to asphalt as the character enters the roadway.

scene_state.functional_zone: open industrial boulevard with overhead pipelines

events.description: emerging from underpass into open industrial area with palm trees and overhead gantries

agents.ego_description: proceeding along the multi-lane industrial road lined with palm trees and overhead pipe structures

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the center median of the industrial road
rust-colored steel gantry structures carrying pipes overhead spanning the road
large vertical digital billboard displaying advertisements on the left side

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide industrial boulevard bathed in sunlight, featuring tall palm trees lining the road and extensive rust-colored steel gantries carrying pipelines overhead. The camera moves steadily forward along the asphalt road, passing industrial buildings on the right with a large digital billboard becoming visible on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial district with storage tanks and city skyline

events.description: silver sedan vehicle passes by on the left side of the road

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the industrial district with the futuristic city skyline visible ahead

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving past on the left side of the road

entered.detail: large cylindrical industrial storage tanks with silver metallic finish
tall futuristic skyscraper with curved design visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues through the industrial district with large storage tanks visible on the left and the futuristic city skyline ahead. A silver sedan passes by on the left side of the road. The digital billboard is now prominent on the left, and the road stretches forward under the extensive network of industrial pipes and gantries.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a cramped industrial sidewalk into a wide, sun-drenched boulevard leading toward a futuristic skyline. It begins by navigating a narrow concrete path bordered by a tall retaining wall and an elevated highway, passing debris and distant smoke stacks as it approaches a traffic intersection. As the camera moves through a covered underpass, the lighting shifts from bright sunlight into deep shadow before emerging back into the light and transitioning from the sidewalk onto the asphalt roadway. The scene then opens into a broad industrial district where the view expands to include tall palm trees and a network of rust-colored steel gantries carrying overhead pipelines. Finally, the camera advances past large storage tanks and a prominent digital billboard as a silver sedan passes by, with the city skyline looming ahead under the sprawling industrial infrastructure.
